debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 100 ≤ n
S : Finset ℕ
hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n)
⊢ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) ∨
    ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)

classical
  by_cases hSfull : S = Finset.Icc n (2 * n)

      have : S = Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by

          have : (n : ℕ) ≤ 2 * n := by

          simpa [Finset.Icc_eq_empty, this] using (Finset.subset_empty.1 (this ▸ hS))
        simpa [this, this]

    refine ⟨a, ha, a, ha, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact ne_of_eq_of_ne rfl (by decide)
    · simpa [IsSquare] using ⟨a, by ring⟩

        exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_pos _) hn))
      subst this

classical
  by_cases hcard : S.card ≤ 1
  · right
    have hcompl : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 := by
      have hsubset : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := hS
      have hcardIcc : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
        have hn' : n ≤ 2 * n := by nlinarith
        simpa [Finset.card_Icc, Nat.add_sub_cancel, hn'] using
          (by
            have : 2 ≤ 2 * n - n + 1 := by nlinarith
            exact this)
      have : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card =
          (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card - S.card := by
        simpa [Finset.card_sdiff, hsubset] using (Finset.card_sdiff hsubset)
      have : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≥ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card - 1 := by
        nlinarith [hcard]
      have : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 := by
        by_contra hgt
        have : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_not_ge hgt)
        nlinarith [hcardIcc]
      exact this
    rcases (Finset.card_le_one.mp hcompl) with huniq
    · cases huniq with
      | inl h0 =>
        simp [h0]
      | inr h1 =>
        rcases h1 with ⟨a, ha, hrest⟩
        have : ∀ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, b = a := by
          intro b hb
          exact hrest b hb
        have : ¬ (∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S,
            a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
          intro hex
          rcases hex with ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy, hs⟩
          have hx' : x = a := this x hx
          have hy' : y = a := this y hy
          exact hxy (by simpa [hx', hy'])
        simpa [this] using this
  · left
    have : 2 ≤ S.card := Nat.lt_of_not_ge hcard
    rcases Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card this with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨0, by simp [Nat.zero_mul]⟩
end IMO2021P1

                have := Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.erase_subset a (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S))
                simpa [hz] using this
              exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hcomplcard)
          exact this
        exact this
      rcases Finset.card_pos.mp hpos with ⟨b, hb⟩
      have hb' : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hb
      have hba : b ≠ a := Finset.ne_of_mem_erase hb
      exact ⟨b, hb', hba⟩
    rcases hex with ⟨b, hb, hba⟩
    refine Or.inr ?_
    refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨Ne.symm hba, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨a + b, by simp⟩

classical
  by_cases h : (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b))
  · exact Or.inl h
  · exact Or.inr (by
      by_contra h'
      exact h (by
        push_neg at h'
        push_neg
        intro a haS b hbS hab
        have : ¬ IsSquare (a + b) := h' a haS b hbS hab
        exact this))

classical
  by_cases hSn : S = ∅
  · right
    have hn' : n ≤ 2 * n := by nlinarith
    refine ⟨n, ?_, n + 1, ?_, by omega, ?_⟩
    · have : n ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
        simpa [Finset.mem_Icc] using And.intro (le_rfl) hn'
      simpa [hSn, Finset.mem_sdiff, this]
    · have : n + 1 ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
        have hn1 : n ≤ n + 1 := Nat.le_succ n
        have h2 : n + 1 ≤ 2 * n := by
          have : n + 1 ≤ 2 * n := by nlinarith
          exact this
        simpa [Finset.mem_Icc] using And.intro hn1 h2
      simpa [hSn, Finset.mem_sdiff, this]
    · have : IsSquare ((n : ℕ) + (n + 1)) := by
        refine ⟨1, ?_⟩
        simp
      simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this
  · left
    rcases Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card ?_ with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    · refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨0, by simp⟩
    · have : 1 < S.card := by
        have : 0 < S.card := Finset.card_pos.mpr (Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hSn)
        omega
      exact this

end IMO2021P1

classical
  by_contra h
  have h1 :
      ¬ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    simpa [not_or] using h
  have h2 :
      ¬ (∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S,
        a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    simpa [not_or] using h
  have hSn : (n : ℕ) ∉ S := by
    intro hnS
    have : n ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
      refine Finset.mem_Icc.2 ?_
      constructor
      · exact le_rfl
      · exact le_trans (le_mul_of_one_le_left (Nat.zero_le _) (by decide : (1:ℕ) ≤ 2)) (le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.zero_le _) (le_rfl))
    have : n ∈ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) := by
      exact Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨this, hnS⟩
    exact False.elim (h2 ⟨n, this, n, this, by simp, by simpa using (show IsSquare (n + n) from ⟨n, by simp [two_mul]⟩)⟩)
  have hnIn : n ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    refine Finset.mem_Icc.2 ?_
    constructor
    · exact le_rfl
    · exact le_trans (le_mul_of_one_le_left (Nat.zero_le _) (by decide : (1:ℕ) ≤ 2)) (le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.zero_le _) (le_rfl))
  have hnIn' : n ∈ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) := by
    exact Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨hnIn, hSn⟩
  have hcontra : False :=
    h2 ⟨n, hnIn', n, hnIn', by simp, by
      refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
      simp [two_mul, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]⟩
  exact hcontra

classical
  by_cases h : (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b))
  · exact Or.inl h
  · exact Or.inr (by
      exfalso
      exact h (by
        classical
        rcases Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card (by
          have : (2 : ℕ) ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
            simpa [Finset.card_Icc, hn, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using
              (by
                have : n + 1 ≤ 2 * n := by
                  nlinarith
                have : (n + 1) ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
                  simp [Finset.mem_Icc, hn, this]
                have : n ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by simp [Finset.mem_Icc, hn]
                have hnne : n ≠ n + 1 := by exact Nat.ne_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self n)
                have : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
                  exact Finset.two_le_card_of_ne_of_mem this this hnne
                exact this) ) with
            ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
          by_cases haS : a ∈ S
          · refine ⟨a, haS, ?_⟩
            by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
            · refine ⟨b, hbS, hab, ?_⟩
              simpa using (show IsSquare (a + b) from ⟨0, by simp⟩)
            · refine ⟨a, haS, ?_⟩
              refine ⟨a, haS, ?_, ?_⟩
              · exact (ne_of_eq_of_ne rfl (Ne.symm hab)).elim
              · simpa using (show IsSquare (a + a) from ⟨a, by ring⟩)
          · refine ⟨b, ?_, ?_⟩
            · by_contra hbS
              have : a ∈ S := by
                have : b ∈ S := hbS
                exact False.elim (haS (by
                  have : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := ha
                  exact (hS this)))
              exact haS this
            · refine ⟨b, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> try assumption
              · exact hab.symm
              · simpa using (show IsSquare (b + b) from ⟨b, by ring⟩) ))
end IMO2021P1

classical
  by_cases hcard : 1 < S.card
  · left
    rcases Finset.one_lt_card.1 hcard with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    simp
  · right
    have hcard' : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 := by
      have hsubset : Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.1 hx).1
      have hsum :
          (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card + S.card ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
        simpa [Finset.card_sdiff (hS.trans (by intro x hx; exact hx)), Nat.add_comm,
          Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
          (Finset.card_le_card (by
            intro x hx
            exact (Finset.mem_union.1 (by
              have : x ∈ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) ∪ S := by
                exact Finset.mem_union.2 (Or.inl hx)
              exact this)) ) )
      have hScard : S.card ≤ 1 := by
        have : ¬ 1 < S.card := le_of_not_gt hcard
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_not_ge this)
      have hIcc : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
        have hn' : n < 2 * n := by
          have : 0 < n := lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : (0:ℕ) < 100) hn
          exact (Nat.lt_mul_of_pos_left (by decide : (0:ℕ) < 2) this)
        simpa using Finset.card_Icc_le_2 (a:=n) (b:=2*n) hn'
      have : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 := by
        have htot : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
          exact Finset.card_le_card hsubset
        exact le_trans htot (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_iff.2 (Nat.zero_le _)))
      exact this
    have : ¬ ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S,
        a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
      intro hex
      rcases hex with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, hs⟩
      have : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
        exact Finset.two_le_card.2 ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
      exact (not_lt_of_ge hcard') this
    exact (or_iff_not_imp_left).2 (by intro _; exact False.elim (this (by assumption)))

classical
  by_cases hncard : 2 ≤ S.card
  · left
    obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card.1 hncard
    refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨a + b, by simp⟩
  · right
    have hncard' : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card = (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
      have : S.card ≤ 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.1 (lt_of_not_ge hncard)
      have hsubset : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := hS
      have hdisj : Disjoint S (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) := by
        exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff
      have hunion : S ∪ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) = Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
        exact Finset.union_sdiff_of_subset hsubset
      have hcard :
          S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card = (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
        simpa [Finset.card_union_of_disjoint hdisj, hunion] using
          (Finset.card_union_of_disjoint hdisj).symm
      have : S.card = 0 := by
        by_contra h0
        have : S.card = 1 := Nat.le_antisymm this (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h0))
        exact False.elim (by
          have := Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _)
          exact by cases this)
      simp [this] at hcard
      exact Nat.add_left_cancel hcard
    have hIcccard : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
      have h : (n : ℤ) ≤ 2 * n := by
        exact_mod_cast (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (show 0 < 2 by decide) n)
      have : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card = 2 * n - n + 1 := by
        simpa [Finset.card_Icc] using (Finset.card_Icc n (2 * n))
      have : 2 ≤ 2 * n - n + 1 := by
        have : 1 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : (1 : ℕ) ≤ 100) hn
        have : 2 ≤ n + 1 := by exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 this)
        simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_sub_cancel, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this
      simpa [this] using this
    have hcompcard : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
      simpa [hncard'] using hIcccard
    obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card.1 hcompcard
    refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨a + b, by simp⟩

classical
  by_cases h : (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b))
  · exact Or.inl h
  · right
    have hI : (n : ℤ) ≤ (2 * n : ℤ) := by
      exact_mod_cast (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (show 0 < (2 : ℕ) by decide) : n ≤ 2 * n)
    have hcard : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card = n + 1 := by
      simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm,
        Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.two_mul] using Finset.card_Icc (a := n) (b := 2 * n)
    have hnonempty : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).Nonempty := by
      refine Finset.nonempty_Icc.2 ?_
      exact Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (show 0 < (2 : ℕ) by decide)
    have hx : (n + 1) / 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
      have := Finset.card_sdiff_add_card_eq_card (s := Finset.Icc n (2 * n)) (t := S) (hS)
      have hle :
          (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card ≤ S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
        simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this.ge
      have hle' :
          (n + 1) ≤ S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
        simpa [hcard] using hle
      have : (n + 1) / 2 ≤ (S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card) / 2 := by
        exact Nat.div_le_div_right hle'
      have hs : S.card / 2 + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card / 2 ≤
          (S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card) / 2 := by
        exact Nat.add_div_le_div_add_div _ _
      have : (n + 1) / 2 ≤ S.card / 2 + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card / 2 := by
        exact le_trans this (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hs))
      have hn2 : (n + 1) / 2 ≤ S.card / 2 ∨ (n + 1) / 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card / 2 :=
        le_or_le_of_add_le_add_left this
      have : (n + 1) / 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card / 2 := by
        cases hn2 with
        | inl hS2 =>
            exfalso
            exact False.elim (by
              have : (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
                classical
                by_contra
                exact h this)
        | inr hC2 => exact hC2
      exact le_trans this (Nat.div_le_self _ _)
    have hcard2 : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
      have : 2 ≤ (n + 1) / 2 := by
        have : 4 ≤ n + 1 := by linarith
        exact Nat.le_trans (by decide) (Nat.div_le_div_right this)
      exact le_trans this hx
    obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide) hcard2)
    refine ⟨a, ha, b, hb, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact hab
    · refine ⟨0, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp
      · simp

classical
  by_cases hnS : (n ∈ S)
  · right
    have hmem : (2 * n) ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
      refine Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ?_
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · exact Finset.mem_Icc.2 ⟨by exact le_mul_of_one_le_left (Nat.zero_le _) (by decide), le_rfl⟩
      · intro h2n
        have : 2 * n ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := hS h2n
        have hnI : n ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
          exact Finset.mem_Icc.2 ⟨le_rfl, by
            have : n ≤ 2 * n := by
              simpa [two_mul] using Nat.le_add_left n n
            exact this⟩
        have : n = 2 * n := by
          have := Finset.eq_of_mem_singleton ?_
          · exact this
          ·
            -- show Icc n (2*n) is singleton if both n and 2*n are in S? avoid; instead use arithmetic
            -- simpler: use hnS and h2n with hS gives n,2n in Icc; not contradiction. We'll instead prove 2*n ∉ S by using hn and parity? too hard.
            -- fallback: pick a different element in complement guaranteed: n not in complement since hnS, but could still have others.
            -- We'll choose a = n+1 (in Icc since n≥100) and show it's not in S? can't.
            -- So abandon and use trivial proof via classical choice on existence of two elements in complement? not.
            sorry
  · left
    -- If n ∉ S, then n and n+1 are in complement? n in complement yes; n+1 maybe not.
    -- We'll instead use existence of two elements in complement by cardinality? not.
    sorry

classical
  by_cases h : (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b))
  · exact Or.inl h
  · refine Or.inr ?_
    by_contra h'
    exact h (by
      classical
      simpa using (not_or_of_not_and_not h (by simpa [not_exists] using h')))

classical
  by_cases h : ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)
  · exact Or.inl h
  · refine Or.inr ?_
    have hne : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).Nonempty := by
      refine Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 ?_
      intro hempty
      have hsub : Finset.Icc n (2 * n) ⊆ S := by
        intro x hx
        have hx' : x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
          simpa [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hempty] using (show x ∈ (∅ : Finset ℕ) from by simpa [hempty])
        exact False.elim (by simpa using hx')
      have heq : S = Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
        exact Finset.Subset.antisymm hS hsub
      have : False := by
        have : ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
          classical
          -- take a = n, b = n+1 (both in Icc n (2*n) for n ≥ 100), and (n)+(n+1)=2n+1 not necessarily square;
          -- instead use a = n, b = n (impossible). So just use contradiction from h with trivial witness when S has <2 elems is hard.
          -- Hence, avoid: use Nonempty by explicit element (n) in complement if S≠Icc; but if S=Icc, complement empty.
          -- We already concluded S=Icc, so complement empty; then h could still be false, so no contradiction.
          -- Therefore, we prove Nonempty differently: pick a = n, show n ∈ Icc and if n ∈ S then use b = n+1 to get square by choosing n large? not guaranteed.
          -- Simplify: just use classical choice: complement may be empty; if empty we can still prove goal by ex falso via hne? No.
          -- So instead of proving Nonempty, directly produce witnesses in complement using classical by_cases on its card.
          admit
        exact h this
      exact False.elim this
    rcases hne with ⟨a, ha⟩
    refine ⟨a, ha, a, ha, by simpa, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨by simpa using (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem ha (by simpa) ), ?_⟩
    simpa using (isSquare_zero)

classical
  by_contra h
  have h₁ : ¬ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    intro hE
    exact h (Or.inl hE)
  have h₂ :
      ¬ (∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S,
        a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    intro hE
    exact h (Or.inr hE)
  by_cases hSn : S = Finset.Icc n (2 * n)
  · have hEmpty : Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S = ∅ := by
      simpa [hSn]
    have : False := by
      apply h₂
      simp [hEmpty]
    exact this.elim
  · have hNonempty : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).Nonempty := by
      simpa [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty, Finset.ssubset_iff_subset_ne, hS, hSn] using
        (Finset.ssubset_iff_subset_ne.2 ⟨hS, hSn⟩)
    obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hNonempty
    have hMemA : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := ha
    by_cases hMore : ((Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).erase a).Nonempty
    · obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hMore
      have hb' : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
        have : b ∈ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).erase a := hb
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.1 this).2
      have hab : a ≠ b := by
        have : b ∈ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).erase a := hb
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.1 this).1.symm
      have : False := by
        apply h₂
        refine ⟨a, hMemA, b, hb', hab, ?_⟩
        · exact ⟨0, by simp⟩
      exact this.elim
    · have hCard : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 := by
        by_contra hgt
        have hge : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := by
          exact Nat.succ_le_iff.1 (Nat.lt_of_not_ge (Nat.not_le.1 hgt))
        have : ((Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).erase a).Nonempty := by
          have ha' : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := hMemA
          have hcard' : 1 ≤ ((Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).erase a).card := by
            simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem ha', Nat.succ_le_iff] using (Nat.pred_le_pred hge)
          exact Finset.card_pos.1 (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_one) hcard')
        exact hMore this
      have : False := by
        have hIcc : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card = n + 1 := by
          simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, two_mul] using
            (Finset.card_Icc n (2 * n))
        have hHuge : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
          have : 2 ≤ n + 1 := by
            exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 100) hn)))
          simpa [hIcc] using this
        exact False.elim (by
          have := hHuge
          trivial)
      exact this.elim

classical
  by_cases h : (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b))
  · exact Or.inl h
  · exact Or.inr (by
      classical
      by_contra h'
      exact h (by
        classical
        by_contra h''
        exact h' (by
          classical
          simpa [not_exists, not_and, not_or, not_imp] using h'')))

classical
  by_cases h : ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)
  · exact Or.inl h
  ·
    right
    have hU : ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n), a ∉ S := by
      by_contra hU'
      have hEq : S = Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
        apply Finset.ext
        intro x
        constructor
        · intro hx
          exact hS hx
        · intro hx
          have : x ∈ S := by
            by_contra hxS
            exact hU' ⟨x, hx, hxS⟩
          exact this
      have : ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
        simpa [hEq] using (show (∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n), ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n),
          a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) from by
            refine ⟨n, ?_, n + 1, ?_, by omega, ?_⟩
            · exact Finset.mem_Icc.2 ⟨le_rfl, by omega⟩
            · exact Finset.mem_Icc.2 ⟨by omega, by omega⟩
            ·
              have : IsSquare ((n : ℕ) + (n + 1)) := by
                refine ⟨1, ?_⟩
                simp
              simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this)
      exact h this
    rcases hU with ⟨a, haI, haS⟩
    refine ⟨a, by simpa [Finset.mem_sdiff, haI, haS], a, by simpa [Finset.mem_sdiff, haI, haS], ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact ne_of_eq_of_ne rfl (by simp)
    ·
      refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      simp

classical
  by_contra h
  have h₁ : ¬ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    intro hA
    exact h (Or.inl hA)
  have h₂ :
      ¬ (∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S,
          a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    intro hB
    exact h (Or.inr hB)
  by_cases hSn : S.Nonempty
  · rcases hSn with ⟨a, haS⟩
    have haI : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := hS haS
    have hb : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
      refine ⟨haI, ?_⟩
      exact haS
    have : False := h₂ ⟨a, hb, a, hb, by simp, by simpa using (show IsSquare (a + a) from ⟨a, by ring⟩)⟩
    exact this.elim
  · have hSn' : S = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hSn
    have hNIcc : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).Nonempty := by
      refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
      simp [hn]
    rcases hNIcc with ⟨a, haI⟩
    have ha : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
      refine ⟨haI, ?_⟩
      simpa [hSn'] 
    have : False := h₂ ⟨a, ha, a, ha, by simp, by simpa using (show IsSquare (a + a) from ⟨a, by ring⟩)⟩
    exact this.elim

classical
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  rcases h with ⟨hS0, hC0⟩
  have hS' : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := hS
  have hC' : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx
    exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
  have hIcc : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card = n + 1 := by
    simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, two_mul, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
      using (Finset.card_Icc n (2 * n))
  have hUnion :
      S ∪ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) = Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with hx | hx
      · exact hS' hx
      · exact hC' hx
    · intro hx
      by_cases hxS : x ∈ S
      · exact Finset.mem_union.mpr (Or.inl hxS)
      · have hxC : x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
          exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxS⟩
        exact Finset.mem_union.mpr (Or.inr hxC)
  have hDisj : Disjoint S (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) := by
    exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff
  have hCard :
      S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card = (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card := by
    simpa [Finset.card_disjoint_union hDisj, hUnion] using
      (Finset.card_disjoint_union hDisj (s := S) (t := (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S))).symm
  have hA : S.card ≤ 1 := by
    by_contra h2
    have : 2 ≤ S.card := Nat.lt_of_not_ge h2
    rcases Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self 1) this) with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    exact hS0 a ha b hb hab (by simpa using IsSquare.zero)
  have hB : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 := by
    by_contra h2
    have : 2 ≤ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card := Nat.lt_of_not_ge h2
    rcases Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self 1) this) with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    exact hC0 a ha b hb hab (by simpa using IsSquare.zero)
  have hSum : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card ≤ 2 := by
    have := congrArg (fun k => k) hCard
    have hs : S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 1 + 1 :=
      Nat.add_le_add hA hB
    have : S.card + (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S).card ≤ 2 := by simpa using hs
    exact le_trans (by simpa [hCard] using this) (le_rfl)
  have : n + 1 ≤ 2 := by
    simpa [hIcc] using hSum
  have : n ≤ 1 := Nat.le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self 1) this)
  exact (not_lt_of_ge hn) (lt_of_le_of_lt this (Nat.lt_succ_self _))

classical
  by_cases h : ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)
  · exact Or.inl h
  · exact Or.inr (by
      classical
      by_contra h2
      exact h (by
        push_neg at h2
        classical
        have : ∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
          classical
          rcases (Finset.eq_empty_or_nonempty S) with rfl | hne
          · exfalso
            apply h2
            intro a ha
            simpa [Finset.not_mem_empty] using ha
          ·
            rcases hne with ⟨x, hx⟩
            refine ⟨x, hx, x, hx, ?_, ?_⟩
            · exact (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx (by simpa using hx))
            · simpa using (IsSquare.zero)
        exact this))
